description:
REQ-031 Phase 3, item 12: Add loop constructs that allow a phase or phase group to repeat until an exit condition is met, with a hard upper bound to prevent infinite loops.

Changes needed:
1. Add `loop_config: Option<LoopConfig>` to `PipelinePhaseEntry` in workflow_config.rs:
   - `max_iterations: u32` (hard upper bound, required)
   - `exit_on: LoopExitCondition` enum: `Verdict(String)` (exit when phase returns this verdict), `AllPass` (exit when all phases in group pass)
2. Add loop state tracking in WorkflowPhaseExecution:
   - `loop_iteration: Option<u32>` (current iteration count)
   - `loop_completed: bool` (exit condition was met)
3. In lifecycle_executor.rs: after phase completion, check if loop_config exists. If exit condition not met and iteration < max_iterations, re-run the phase instead of advancing
4. When loop exits (condition met or max hit), advance to next phase normally. If max_iterations hit without exit condition, treat as configurable: fail or advance with warning
5. Add YAML support: `loop: { max_iterations: 5, exit_on: { verdict: advance } }`
6. Add tests: loop runs 3 times then exits on verdict, loop hits max_iterations and fails, loop exits on first iteration

Example use case — iterative refinement:
```yaml
phases:
  - id: implement
  - id: test
    mode: command
    command: "cargo test"
    loop:
      max_iterations: 3
      exit_on: { verdict: advance }  # exit when tests pass
    on_verdict:
      rework: { target: implement }  # fix implementation on test failure
```

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow_config.rs (PipelinePhaseEntry)
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow/lifecycle_executor.rs
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/types.rs (WorkflowPhaseExecution)
title: Add bounded loop constructs for iterative workflow phases
